zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Browne III於1278年7月8日出生在英國林可爾史爾斯坦福時，他的父親Sir John Browne II30歲，母親Dorthea Swinstead33歲。他於1310年與Elizabeth Rebecca Yeidhall在英國林可爾史爾斯坦福結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1318年1月8日在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾享年39歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Browne III于1278年7月8日出生在英国林可爾史爾斯坦福时，他的父亲Sir John Browne II30岁，母亲Dorthea Swinstead33岁。他于1310年与Elizabeth Rebecca Yeidhall在英国林可爾史爾斯坦福结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1318年1月8日在英国英格兰林可爾史爾享年39岁，埋葬在英国英格兰林可爾史爾。

nameMeanings.name: Browne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably also an Americanized form (translation into English) of German   Braune   or   Braun  .
Irish: phonetic Anglicization of Mac an Bhreitheamhnaigh; see Breheny .

variants.name: Brown
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish: generally a nickname referring to the color of the hair or complexion, Middle English br(o)un, from Old English brūn or Old French brun. This word is occasionally found in Old French, Middle English and Old Norse as a personal name or byname (Middle English personal name Brun, Broun, ancient Germanic Bruno, Old English Brūn, or possibly Old Norse Brúnn or Brúni). Brun- was also an ancient Germanic name-forming element. Some instances of Old English Brūn as a personal name may therefore be short forms of compound names such as Brūngar, Brūnwine, etc. As a Scottish and Irish name, it sometimes represents a translation of Gaelic Donn (see below). Brown (including in the senses below) is the fourth most frequent surname in the US. It is also very common among African Americans and Native Americans (see also 5 below).
Irish and Scottish: adopted for Ó Duinn (see Dunn ) or for any of the many Irish and Scottish Gaelic names containing the element donn ‘brown-haired’ (also meaning ‘chieftain’), for example Donahue .
Irish: phonetic Anglicization of Mac an Bhreitheamhnaigh; see Breheny .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Browne III was born on 8 July 1278, in Stamford, Lincolnshire, England, his father, Sir John Browne II, was 30 and his mother, Dorthea Swinstead, was 33. He married Elizabeth Rebecca Yeidhall in 1310, in Stamford, Lincolnshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 8 January 1318, in Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 39, and was buried in Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Browne III est né le 8 juillet 1278, à Stamford, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Browne II, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Dorthea Swinstead, avait 33 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Rebecca Yeidhall en 1310, à Stamford, Lincolnshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 8 janvier 1318, à Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 39 ans, et a été enterré à Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Browne III am 8. Juli 1278 in Stamford, Lincolnshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Browne II 30 und seine Mutter Dorthea Swinstead 33. Er hat 1310 in Stamford, Lincolnshire, England Elizabeth Rebecca Yeidhall geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 8. Januar 1318 im Alter von 39 Jahren in Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Browne III è nato il il 8 luglio 1278 nel Stamford, Lincolnshire, England, il suo padre, Sir John Browne II, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Dorthea Swinstead, aveva 33 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Rebecca Yeidhall nel 1310, nel Stamford, Lincolnshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 8 gennaio 1318, nel Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 39 anni, e fu sepolto a Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Browne IIIが1278年7月8日にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアスタムフォードで生まれた時，父Sir John Browne IIは30歳，母Dorthea Swinsteadは33歳であった。1310年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアスタムフォードでElizabeth Rebecca Yeidhallと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1318年1月8日にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアで39歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Browne III(이)가 1278년 7월 8일 영국 링코실르 스타퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Browne II(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Dorthea Swinstead(은)는 33세였다. 그는 1310년 영국 링코실르 스타퍼드에서 Elizabeth Rebecca Yeidhall(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1318년 1월 8일 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르에서 39세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르에 묻혔다.

pt.8 July 1278–8 January 1318: 8 de julho de 1278–8 de janeiro de 1318
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Browne III nasceu em 8 de julho de 1278, em Stamford, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John Browne II, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Dorthea Swinstead, tinha 33 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Rebecca Yeidhall em 1310, em Stamford, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 8 de janeiro de 1318, em Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 39 anos, e foi sepultado em Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Browne III родился 8 июля 1278 г. в местности стамфорд, линколншир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir John Browne II было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Dorthea Swinstead, 33. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Rebecca Yeidhall в 1310 г. в местности стамфорд, линколншир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 8 января 1318 г. в местности линколншир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 39 лет и был похоронен в местности линколншир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.8 July 1278–8 January 1318: 8 de julio de 1278–8 de enero de 1318
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John Browne III nació el 8 de julio de 1278, en Stamford, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John Browne II, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Dorthea Swinstead, tenía 33 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Rebecca Yeidhall en 1310, en Stamford, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 8 de enero de 1318, en Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 39 años, y fue sepultado en Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
